issue_summary: WordPress REST API 403 blocking %%2C in wp-json query strings. ModSecurity OWASP CRS 4.25.0 rule 942200 false positive on ARGS:_fields.
resolution: Added ModSecurity exception: Rule ID 942200, path /wp-json/.* in Plesk WAF. Resolved.

issue_summary: Cannot add as addon domain in cPanel - DNS entry already exists in cluster. Same issue as ubuntutrading.co.za.
resolution: Run killdns on lnxwebs04: /usr/local/cpanel/bin/whmapi1 killdns domain=danceboutiquedirect.co.za

issue_summary: Server unresponsive - customer could not RDP or ping. ILOM IP: 196.220.49.131. Accessed via ILOM KVM console (Java applet through Firefox on ILOM).
resolution: Rebooted server via ILOM KVM console. Server came back online. Customer confirmed able to connect and ping.

issue_summary: SARS mail server blocking .wmf attachments on emails from faeda@platinuminc.co.za to rmagodi@sars.gov.za. Recipient-side security policy.
resolution: Advised client to resend files as PDF/ZIP or contact SARS IT to release held messages and whitelist sender.

issue_summary: Emails landing in Gmail spam. SPF missing mail server IP 41.185.110.23. DMARC p=quarantine causes spam folder placement when SPF fails.
resolution: Advised client on SPF fix — not a 1-grid issue.

issue_summary: Second occurrence of server unresponsive in under 24 hours. Client requested reboot.
resolution: Rebooted via ILOM. Server back online.

issue_summary: Client receiving SSL certificate warning on Mac Mail for mail.bellagio.co.za. Server was using default/self-signed cert (Default_CA_ixkkcF0ThpkhSbM) instead of valid Let's Encrypt cert for mail service.
resolution: Installed Let's Encrypt SSL certificate in cPanel for bellagio.co.za covering *.bellagio.co.za. Restarted Dovecot to apply. SSL now valid and trusted.

issue_summary: info@pwflooring.co.za sending spam impersonating MWEB with fake invoice attachments. Headers show authenticated SMTP from 196.208.36.80 (DDII/Vox) with valid credentials. DKIM signed. Password suspected compromised.
resolution: Password reset by customer. Advised check forwarders, enable DMARC, scan device, review access logs. Session context confirms resolved.

issue_summary: New domain registration - client could not add online. Payment pending debit order 01.06.2026. Danielle activated domain in meantime.
resolution: Domain activated by Danielle. Debit order scheduled 01.06.2026. DNS missing MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC - needs configuration.

issue_summary: Not receiving emails from rgwsolutions.co.za (external, Pressable). Need to whitelist sender domain.
FTP port 21 blocked due to security breach - same as wildebeesthoek.co.za. Customer cannot connect. Jessica advised File Manager workaround. Customer requested upload of sitemap XML file.
Client reports SSL issue with mail.eduvisa.co.uk. Current Let's Encrypt cert valid until 20 Jul 2026 and covers mail.eduvisa.co.uk in SAN. Cert being served correctly on ports 993/995/465.
Email delays reported. Missing PTR, MailChannels not in SPF. Previous ticket logged as network DDoS issue. Requested email headers for further analysis.
SSL expired 21 Aug 2025. Positive SSL product active but dashboard maintenance blocking reissue.
resolution: Pending - needs Plesk admin/WHMCS access to regenerate Sectigo certificate

issue_summary: Phishing page targeting 1-grid customers. Spoofs document viewer, loads fake 1-grid login via iframe on bim-r.ma:8443/gygy. Random subdomain + random key evasion. Registrant: Ismail Khoubbaz (bimrengineering@gmail.com, +212.663013717). Registrar: ADK MEDIA (Casablanca).
resolution: Reported to Cloudflare abuse (abuse@cloudflare.com) and registrar (domains@adk-media.com). Block *.bim-r.ma at firewall.
